sections.name: Section 1 - Constants and Imports
sections.interface: defines constants PIECE_TYPES, MOVE_NOTATION, FILE_NAME; imports pygame for visual simulation

sections.name: Section 2 - Chess Piece Classes
sections.description: Defines classes for each type of chess piece.
sections.interface: defines classes Pawn, Knight, Bishop, Rook, Queen, King; may call constants PIECE_TYPES

sections.name: Section 3 - Chess Board and Move Notation
sections.description: Defines the chess board class and move notation functions.
sections.interface: defines classes ChessBoard, Piece; may call classes from Section 2; defines functions get_move_notation, print_board

sections.name: Section 4 - AI Players and Game Logic
sections.description: Defines the AI players and game logic.
sections.interface: defines classes AIPlayer; may call classes from Section 3; defines functions make_move, play_game

sections.name: Section 5 - Main Entry Point
sections.description: Contains the main entry point of the program.
sections.interface: defines function main; may call classes and functions from earlier sections

notes: The hardest section (Section 3) is assigned to the strongest model (deepseek-coder-v2:16b). The other sections are assigned based on their difficulty level, with Section 1 being relatively easy and Section 4 requiring more complex logic.
